section1.title: 1. What data we collect
section1.intro: When placing an order on the
section1.introEnd: website, we request the following data from you:
section1.bullet1: First and last name — to identify the recipient of the package;
section1.bullet2: Contact phone number — to confirm the order and send an SMS with the tracking number;
section1.bullet3: City and branch number of 'Nova Poshta' — to carry out delivery.

section2.title: 2. Purposes of data processing
section2.intro: Your personal data is used exclusively for:
section2.bullet1: Processing, assembling, and shipping your order;
section2.bullet2: Informing you about the delivery status;
section2.bullet3: The manager contacting you to confirm the details.

section3.title: 3. Data transfer to third parties
section3.text: We transfer your data (Name, Phone, City, Branch) exclusively to the logistics service 'Nova Poshta' for generating an express waybill. We guarantee that your data is not transferred to third-party marketing agencies and third parties not involved in the order fulfillment process.

section4.title: 4. Data protection
section4.text: All data is transmitted via the secure HTTPS protocol and stored in a private backend database (Strapi), accessible only to a limited circle of store administrators.

section1.title: 1. General Provisions
section1.p1_start: 1.1. This agreement is an official offer (public offer) of the online store
section1.p1_end: «Green Heritage» (hereinafter — «Seller») to any individual or legal entity (hereinafter — «Buyer») that accepts these terms and conditions and places an order on the website.
section1.p2: 1.2. The moment of full and unconditional acceptance of the Seller's offer by the Buyer (acceptance of the offer) is considered to be clicking the 'Confirm order' button on the checkout page.

section2.title: 2. Subject of the Agreement
section2.p1: 2.1. The Seller undertakes to transfer ownership of the goods (plants, seedlings, trees, and related goods) to the Buyer, and the Buyer undertakes to pay for and accept the Goods under the terms of this Agreement.

section3.title: 3. Ordering and Delivery
section3.p1: 3.1. Ordering Goods is carried out by the Buyer through the online store service.
section3.p2: 3.2. Delivery of Goods is carried out throughout Ukraine by the logistics company 'Nova Poshta' at the carrier's rates.
section3.p3: 3.3. The Seller is not responsible for delivery delays caused by the fault of the carrier.

section4.title: 4. Returns and Exchanges
section4.p1: 4.1. According to Ukrainian legislation, live plants of proper quality are not subject to exchange and return. However, the Seller guarantees the high quality of the planting material and is ready to consider individual cases of damage during transportation if the claim is made at the moment of receipt at the 'Nova Poshta' branch.

section5.title: 5. Seller's Details
section5.legalInfo: Sole Proprietorship / Legal Entity (enter your data here)

services.title: Our Services
services.intro: «Green Heritage» is more than just a store. We help you create a lasting green legacy on your plot.

service1.title: Design of Arboretum Parks and Commercial Plantations
service1.desc: Our specialists visit the site and conduct soil analysis. We can design a forest-garden, an arboretum, a commercial plantation of valuable species (mahogany), or, for example, a plantation not for timber, but for harvesting pine nuts. We will calculate profitability. This is truly something you can pass down as a legacy to your children, so they can start not from scratch, but with a ready-made foundation. Please, think about it. By caring for the legacy of your children, you are also doing good for all other people and planet Earth as a whole!

service2.title: Landscape Design
service2.desc: Creation of unique coniferous compositions, rockeries, and evergreen hedges on a turnkey basis.

service3.title: Dendrologist Consultation
service3.desc: Diagnosis of plant diseases, selection of proper fertilizers, and creation of a year-round care map.

rare.title: Rare Species
rare.desc: We specialize in rare and valuable species from all over the world.

care.title: Grown with Care
care.desc: Each tree is grown in open ground with close attention to detail.

quality.title: Quality & Health
quality.desc: We guarantee the excellent survival rate of every plant.

delivery.title: Delivery Across Ukraine
delivery.desc: We will carefully pack and deliver to any corner of the country.

footer.aboutText: Our nursery is a place where rare coniferous trees are grown with love and respect for nature.

hero.descriptionLine1: We cultivate rare and valuable species of coniferous trees with love for nature and close attention to detail.
hero.descriptionLine2: Each tree is a part of your legacy.
